name: shipflow-mcp
description: ShipFlow MCP — 33 feature-delivery tools at POST /mcp. Full parity with the ShipFlow Agent (CI-verified). Workspace-scoped feature pipeline + GitHub integration + analytics.

auth.note: Option A: BetterAuth session cookies from web sign-in. Option B: Authorization: Bearer <SHIPFLOW_MCP_API_KEY> — must match SHIPFLOW_MCP_USER_ID env (scoped; no arbitrary impersonation).

tools.name: get_workspace
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's ShipFlow workspace (organization + project + role).

tools.name: list_feature_requests
tools.description: List feature requests in the workspace pipeline, newest first. Optional limit (1–50).

tools.name: get_feature_request
tools.description: Get a single feature request with PRD, engineering tasks, and clarification messages.

tools.name: create_feature_request
tools.description: Submit a new employee feature request. Optionally runs AI triage (priority, effort, clarifying questions).

tools.name: triage_feature_request
tools.description: Run AI triage on an existing feature request — priority, category, impact summary, clarifying questions.

tools.name: generate_feature_prd
tools.description: Generate an AI PRD (problem, goals, user stories, acceptance criteria) and mark feature prd_ready.

tools.name: generate_feature_tasks
tools.description: Break a PRD into engineering tasks and move the feature to planning status.

tools.name: add_clarification
tools.description: Add a clarification note to a feature request (user or agent role).

tools.name: run_ai_review
tools.description: Run an AI pre-ship review against PRD + tasks. Returns pass/fail findings and updates pipeline status.

tools.name: request_human_review
tools.description: Move a feature to human_review — awaiting human sign-off before ship.

tools.name: update_feature_status
tools.description: Move a feature request to any valid pipeline status (submitted → shipped).

tools.name: get_pipeline_summary
tools.description: Counts of features by stage: submitted, in delivery, awaiting approval, shipped.

tools.name: github_connection_status
tools.description: Check whether the GitHub App is connected for the workspace.

tools.name: list_github_repositories
tools.description: List GitHub repositories linked after GitHub App installation.

tools.name: check_existing_capability
tools.description: Check if a capability already exists before building — returns education message if duplicate.

tools.name: intake_from_channel
tools.description: Intake a feature from email, support ticket, customer call, or external API.

tools.name: list_ai_reviews
tools.description: List AI QA review iterations with blocking and non-blocking issues.

tools.name: get_feature_delivery
tools.description: Delivery timeline, summary, and recommended next step for a feature.

tools.name: get_review_delta
tools.description: Compare last two AI review iterations — resolved, persisting, and new issues.

tools.name: get_review_stats
tools.description: Aggregate AI review statistics: pass rate, avg issues, iteration count.

tools.name: get_review_loop_health
tools.description: Comprehensive review loop health score 0–100 with SLA status and cycle times.

tools.name: resolve_review_issue
tools.description: Mark an individual AI review issue as resolved or reopen it, with optional notes.

tools.name: approve_feature
tools.description: Grant human approval — blocked if AI has unresolved blocking issues.

tools.name: reject_feature
tools.description: Reject a feature request with a required reason.

tools.name: request_changes
tools.description: Request changes before approval — moves feature to fix_needed.

tools.name: get_approval_history
tools.description: Full audit trail of every human approval decision for a feature.

tools.name: get_approval_briefing
tools.description: AI-generated pre-approval briefing: risk level, recommendation, and specific items to verify.

tools.name: analyze_change_request
tools.description: Convert PM change-request notes into structured developer action items.

tools.name: predict_delivery_timeline
tools.description: Predict feature ship date from project velocity history and complexity.

tools.name: check_pipeline_duplicates
tools.description: Semantically detect near-duplicate feature requests in the active pipeline.

tools.name: get_pipeline_health
tools.description: Pipeline health: bottlenecks, velocity, shipped last 30 days, health label.

tools.name: get_developer_onboarding_guide
tools.description: AI First-30-Minutes guide for a developer picking up an engineering task.

tools.name: update_engineering_task_status
tools.description: Move an engineering task on the Kanban board (backlog → done).

tools.name: explain_engineering_task
tools.description: Interactive task walkthrough: pseudo-code (brief) or full guide; optional codebase-aware analysis when GitHub is connected.
